text: I have been thinking about getting one of these for my kids

text: Do we feel like it’s still a good deal? My husband was freaked out by the 90$ a year subscription to even get the games

text: A 50% off coupon popped up! It was a “Max $12 off” situation 😂 got me all excited.

text: I’ve been looking into this!!!

text: Not me sitting here AMAZED by your strength 😂😂😂

text: First of all this is a brilliant gaming system for all ages. I've seen chaos turn into organized play in large group events very fast. I have one already but if you are on the fence buy it! Also, the tv mount is my husbands product! If you want more info on it DM me.
text_zh: 首先，这是一个适合所有年龄段的绝妙游戏系统。我见过在大型集体活动中，混乱迅速转变为有组织的玩耍。我已经有一个了，如果你还在犹豫，就买吧！另外，电视支架是我丈夫的产品！如果你想了解更多信息，请私信我。
